problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: If Shape memory alloy phase transition is applied to at, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
